# Architecture

This is a navigation alias. Canonical architecture sources stay in the files below.

## Canonical Sources

- Product architecture: `PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE.md`
- Product blueprint and entities: `PRODUCT_BLUEPRINT.md`
- Runtime contracts: `.pfo/`
- Scope and forbidden changes: `.pfo/SCOPE_LOCK.md`, `.pfo/FORBIDDEN_CHANGES.md`

## Rule

Update `PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE.md` first. Keep this file as a short index only.
